sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Proto Labs: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Proto Labs Inc. (PRLB) reported a first-quarter profit of $8.1 million, or 33 cents per share. Adjusted earnings were 54 cents per share, with total revenue reaching $139.3 million. The company forecasts its per-share earnings for the current quarter ending in June to be between 50 cents and 58 cents.

feed.title: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc To Go Ex-Dividend On June 30th, 2026 With 0.25 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: This article announces that Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) will go ex-dividend on June 30th, 2026. Shareholders will receive a dividend of 0.25 USD per share. This is an important date for investors as they need to own the shares before the ex-dividend date to be eligible for the payment.

feed.title: Precision Drilling (NYSE: PDS) Q1 2026 revenue rises as earnings fall
feed.summary: Precision Drilling Corporation reported a 6% increase in Q1 2026 revenue to $526,051 thousand, driven by higher drilling activity in Canada and the U.S. However, net earnings attributable to shareholders fell by approximately half to $17,376 thousand, and Adjusted EBITDA declined by 10% to $123,947 thousand, primarily due to increased share-based compensation, depreciation, and international reactivation costs. The company plans to reduce debt by $100 million in 2026 and allocate up to 50% of free cash flow to share repurchases, while increasing its capital spending outlook to $265 million for the year.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Price Target Raised to $77.00
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has raised its price target for Altria Group (NYSE:MO) to $77.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 5.5% upside. This follows Altria's strong Q1 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations with $1.32 EPS and $4.76 billion in revenue, driven by pricing power and Marlboro's momentum. Despite the positive outlook from Stifel Nicolaus, the broader consensus among analysts remains a "Hold" with an average target of $69.38.

feed.title: Moderna beats revenue expectations with $389M, but litigation dogs earnings
feed.summary: Moderna exceeded revenue expectations in the first quarter with $389 million, despite reporting a significant net loss of $1.3 billion. The loss was primarily due to a $950 million settlement payment to Arbutus for a patent dispute over lipid nanoparticle technology. CEO Stéphane Bancel expressed confidence in the company's return to prosperity, focusing on international sales, regulatory approvals, and new modalities, even as some regulatory setbacks for its flu vaccines have analysts questioning its breakeven timeline.

feed.title: Federal Realty Shares Rise After Strong Q1 Earnings and Guidance Boost
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust reported robust first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding analyst expectations and subsequently raising its full-year guidance, which led to a nearly 2% rise in its stock. The strong performance was driven by a significant gain from asset sales, particularly the disposition of Misora at Santana Row, alongside solid leasing activity and improved occupancy rates across its commercial and residential portfolios. The company's focus on prime locations and affluent demographics is highlighted as a key factor in its resilience during a volatile economic period.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001213900-26-050590
feed.summary: This article details an EDGAR filing (Form 497) by Innovator ETFs Trust, accessible via SEC.gov, with Accession No. 0001213900-26-050590. The filing, dated May 1, 2026, includes definitive materials for the Innovator U.S. Equity Power Buffer ETF - May and provides links to various document types, including iXBRL, XBRL files, and graphic elements. It also lists key information about the filer, such as CIK, EIN, and address.

feed.title: Linde expects further helium price rises amid supply tightness
feed.summary: Industrial gas major Linde anticipates further increases in helium prices due to global supply tightness exacerbated by geopolitical disruptions, particularly the Middle East conflict. While Q1 helium sales were flat year-on-year, a 2% decline in pricing was counteracted by an increase in volumes, and the company expects the impact of recent disruptions to continue driving prices up in the coming months.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Price Target Cut to $145.00 by Analysts at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company analysts have lowered their price target for Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) from $150.00 to $145.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment follows Merck's recent Q1 earnings report, which beat adjusted EPS and revenue expectations and led to a raised adjusted profit outlook, despite a GAAP loss due to an acquisition-related charge. The report also highlights significant insider selling activity, with executives selling shares worth approximately $38.3 million in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Crown Castle completes $8.5bn sale of fiber and small cells assets
feed.summary: Crown Castle has completed the sale of its fiber and small cells assets for $8.5 billion, marking its pivot to become a "pure-play" tower company. Zayo Group Holdings Inc. acquired the fiber solutions business, adding 90,000 route miles to its network, while EQT Active Core Infrastructure fund company Arium Networks purchased the small cells assets. Crown Castle plans to use the proceeds to repurchase $1 billion in shares and reduce outstanding debt by over $7 billion, focusing on its existing 40,000 cell towers across the US.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Inc Stock (US6974351057): Analyst Upgrade Sparks Rally
authors: AD HOC NEWS Editorial Team – Equity Coverage
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks Inc stock rallied after a major analyst upgrade, driven by strong cybersecurity demand and improving margins. The company's shares jumped approximately 4.2% intraday, trading at $312.45 on April 29, 2026. Analysts from J.P. Morgan and Goldman Sachs reiterated positive views, highlighting Palo Alto Networks' robust positioning in cloud and AI-driven security, with an average price target of $335.00.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Company partners with 23XI Racing; Bubba Wallace rejoins Coca-Cola Racing Family
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company has partnered with 23XI Racing as the Exclusive Beverage Partner for Bubba Wallace and the No. 23 team. This builds on a previous relationship with Coca-Cola Consolidated and marks Wallace's return to the Coca-Cola Racing Family. To celebrate, a co-branded paint scheme with Hardee’s will debut on Wallace’s car at Watkins Glen International on May 10th.

feed.title: Mizuho Securities Adjusts ResMed Price Target to $235 From $255, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho Securities has lowered its price target for ResMed (RMD) to $235 from $255, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a series of other analyst price target changes for ResMed, some increasing and some decreasing, following recent financial reports. ResMed specializes in medical devices, masks, and software for respiratory disorders, with a significant portion of its sales in the United States.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Veralto to $101 From $99, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Veralto (VLTO) to $101 from $99, while keeping a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a modest upgrade in the firm's outlook for the company. The article, published on May 1, 2026, also lists recent analyst price target changes for Veralto from other firms like Goldman Sachs, RBC, BMO Capital, and Deutsche Bank.

feed.title: Did Caesars’ Digital Surge and US$18 Billion Bid Talks Just Shift Caesars Entertainment's (CZR) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment reported an increase in Q1 revenue and a narrowing net loss, driven by record growth in its Digital segment. This performance, coupled with ongoing US$18 billion takeover talks from Tilman Fertitta, is reshaping the company’s investment narrative towards cash generation and portfolio expansion, despite its significant debt load. The durability of Digital outperformance will be crucial for shareholders alongside the outcome of the takeover bid.

feed.title: American Water serves 14 million people, plans up to $48B in upgrades
feed.summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK) marked Drinking Water Week by highlighting its commitment to providing safe, reliable, and affordable water to the 14 million people it serves. The company announced plans to invest up to $48 billion over the next decade in infrastructure improvements, including renewals, water quality, resiliency, technology, and acquisitions. This significant capital investment addresses aging infrastructure and aims to ensure continued high-quality service for future generations.

feed.title: Merck & Co Inc Stock (MRK) Moved Up by 4.09% on May 1: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Merck & Co Inc (MRK) saw a 4.09% increase in its stock price on May 1, driven by strong first-quarter 2026 financial results that exceeded analyst expectations. The company reported robust sales for KEYTRUDA and WINREVAIR, along with positive contributions from its Animal Health segment. Merck also raised its full-year 2026 revenue and EPS guidance, further boosting investor confidence despite a significant one-time acquisition charge.

feed.title: Linde PLC Stock (LIN) Moved Up by 3.33% on May 1: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Linde PLC's stock surged by 3.33% on May 1st, driven by strong Q1 2026 financial results that surpassed analyst expectations for both adjusted EPS and revenue. Despite minor intraday volatility due to its full-year EPS guidance midpoint being slightly below some estimates, the positive quarterly performance, robust operational indicators, and commitment to shareholder value contributed to investor confidence. The company maintains a positive long-term outlook supported by strategic focus on decarbonization, semiconductors, and healthcare demands, alongside a substantial project backlog.

feed.title: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) Stock Price Expected to Rise, JPMorgan Chase & Co. Analyst Says
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its price target for Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) to $805 from $627, maintaining an "overweight" rating and implying an 11.27% upside. This follows Quanta Services' announcement of record Q1 results, including $7.87 billion in revenue and $2.68 adjusted EPS, and an increase in its full-year 2026 guidance to $13.55-$14.25 EPS. The company also reported a substantial $48.5 billion backlog, signaling strong future demand and prompting multiple analysts to raise their price targets.

feed.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights NVIDIA, Broadcom, Micron Technology, Western Digital, Vertiv and others
feed.summary: This Zacks Analyst Blog discusses how major tech companies like Meta, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon are increasing their AI capital expenditure budgets, anticipating significant growth in AI-powered data centers. The article highlights several companies poised to benefit from this AI frenzy, including semiconductor giants like NVIDIA and Broadcom, memory and storage providers like Micron Technology and Western Digital, and data center infrastructure companies such as Vertiv and Comfort Systems USA. These companies are capitalizing on the demand for high-performance chips, advanced networking, specialized cooling systems, and high-capacity storage essential for AI development.

feed.title: Nasus Pharma to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Nasus Pharma, a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, announced its participation in two upcoming investor conferences in May 2026. CFO Eyal Rubin will attend the "Market Movers Investor Summit" and the "D. Boral Capital Global Conference" in New York, engaging in one-on-one meetings with interested investors. The company focuses on developing innovative intranasal products, including NS002, an intranasal epinephrine product for anaphylaxis.

feed.title: DTE pours $1.8M into group opposing public takeover of its power grid in Ann Arbor
feed.summary: DTE Energy has invested $1.8 million into an opposition group called the "Ann Arbor Responsible Energy Coalition" to fight a proposed public takeover of its power grid in Ann Arbor. While DTE's name is largely absent from the coalition's public materials, campaign finance disclosures reveal the utility funded 96% of its war chest and was initially registered to DTE's headquarters. The coalition argues that a city takeover would significantly increase utility bills and lead to high costs and litigation, while activists contend it's a DTE "front group" designed to protect the utility's profits.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (NYSE:FIS) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.44
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.44 per share, set to be paid on June 25th to shareholders of record as of June 11th. This dividend represents an annualized payout of $1.76 and a yield of 3.8%. The company's dividend appears well-covered with a payout ratio of 28.2% and an anticipated future payout ratio of 25.4% based on analyst EPS projections for next year.

feed.title: Clorox sees more work ahead, lowers FY26 outlook (CLX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Clorox (CLX) shares dropped significantly after its fiscal third-quarter results and a lowered FY26 outlook, indicating ongoing challenges for the consumer products company. The reduced profitability guidance is attributed to declines in the Lifestyle segment, increased manufacturing and logistics expenses, and costs associated with the GOJO acquisition. These factors suggest continued pressure on the company's margins and overall profitability.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum Corporation to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.26 (NYSE:OXY)
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, payable on July 15th to shareholders of record on June 10th. This translates to an annualized payout of $1.04 and a yield of approximately 1.8%, with analysts projecting sufficient future earnings to cover the dividend. Despite beating EPS estimates, the company's shares fell after missing revenue expectations, and it currently holds a P/E ratio of 36.3 and a market capitalization of $57.59 billion.

feed.title: F/m美國國庫30年期債券ETF-UTHY-ETF淨值表格
feed.summary: This article provides the net asset value (NAV) and market price for the F/m U.S. Treasury 30 Year Bond ETF (UTHY) as of April 22nd. It details the daily net asset values and market prices for the ETF over the past 30 days, along with general information about the ETF. The piece also includes important disclaimers regarding performance calculations, net asset value fluctuations, sales fees, and the informational nature of the data provided.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Structured Investments Uncapped Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the lesser performing of the Nasdaq-100 Index and the S&P 500 Futures Excess Return Index, due May 8, 2031. These notes are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return of at least 2.12 times the appreciation of the lesser performing index, but investors risk losing up to 85.00% of their principal if the indices perform poorly. The notes are unsecured obligations guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. and are subject to significant risks, including credit risk and volatility of the underlying futures contracts.

feed.title: Outset Medical (OM) price target decreased by 14.29% to 9.18
feed.summary: This article states that Outset Medical's (OM) price target has been decreased by 14.29% to 9.18. No further details are provided regarding the reasons for this change or the involved analysts.

feed.title: Organon (NYSE:OGN) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: Organon (NYSE:OGN) reported a miss on Wall Street's revenue and earnings expectations for Q1 CY2026, with sales declining 3.5% year-on-year to $1.46 billion and adjusted EPS coming in 16.8% below consensus at $0.71. The company has shown a struggle with consistent revenue growth and decreasing profitability over the past several years. Analysts anticipate revenue to remain flat and full-year EPS to grow marginally in the next 12 months, highlighting ongoing challenges for the pharmaceutical firm.

feed.title: CoStar Stock Has Fallen 47% YTD. Can CSGP Still Reach $94 by 2028?
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) stock has dropped 47% YTD due to significant investments in Homes.com, which have pressured profitability despite strong revenue growth. While the company's core businesses maintain high gross margins, operating income has suffered from increased spending. A valuation model suggests CSGP could reach $94 per share by December 2028, representing a 173% total return, if revenue growth continues and margins recover.

feed.title: Pilgrim’s Pride (NASDAQ: PPC) investors approve board, pay, auditor at 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Pilgrim's Pride (NASDAQ: PPC) shareholders approved the election of eight JBS Directors and two Equity Directors to the board, as well as the executive compensation program on an advisory basis. They also ratified KPMG LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 27, 2026. However, two stockholder proposals, one regarding diversity and inclusion policies and another concerning political spending disclosure, were both voted down.

feed.title: Lam Research (LRCX) proposed sale: 18,170 shares via Fidelity (NASDAQ)
feed.summary: A recently filed Form 144 indicates a proposed sale of 18,170 shares of Lam Research (LRCX) common stock through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, with an aggregate market value of approximately $4.64 million. The filing details that these shares originate from restricted stock vesting events in 2022 and 2024 related to compensation awards. It's important to note that a Form 144 is a notice of intent for a potential sale and does not confirm that the shares have already been sold.

feed.title: Humana (NYSE:HUM) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Cantor Fitzgerald Analyst Says
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target for Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock to $264, suggesting a 12.18% upside, despite the company's Q1 earnings beat and strong membership growth, as management warned of lower Medicare Advantage Star ratings and payment headwinds. Other analysts have varied ratings, with the consensus being a "Hold" at a target of $243.17. Insider Sanjay K. Shetty recently purchased 810 shares, and institutional investors own a significant portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Lowers Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) Price Target to $100.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has reduced its price target for Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) to $100.00 from $140.00, citing a potential upside of 27.73%. This adjustment follows the company's Q1 EPS miss, despite a revenue beat, and management's warning of softer demand. Builders FirstSource's board has authorized a $500 million share buyback, and the stock currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $106.31 among analysts.

feed.title: Humana (NYSE:HUM) Price Target Raised to $250.00
feed.summary: Evercore raised its price target on Humana (NYSE:HUM) to $250.00 from $195.00, suggesting a potential upside of 6.23%, though the consensus rating remains "Hold." Despite beating Q1 earnings and revenue estimates, Humana's shares fell due to unchanged guidance, a decline in Medicare Advantage Star ratings, and warnings about Medicare payment updates not keeping pace with costs. The company reported EPS of $10.31 on revenue of $39.65 billion, with insider buying activity and institutional investments noted.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Issues Positive Forecast for Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has increased its price target for Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) to $1,050 from $960, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a substantial upside for the stock. This positive forecast follows Caterpillar's strong first-quarter results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, raising its outlook, and highlighting growth drivers like AI/data-center demand and a record backlog. Despite analyst optimism, the report notes potential headwinds from significant insider selling and expected tariff costs in 2026.

feed.title: 10 Exceptional Stocks With Double-Digit Dividend Raises
feed.summary: This article identifies a rare group of 10 dividend-paying stocks that have consistently achieved double-digit dividend growth for five consecutive years and passed rigorous checks. David Harrell of Morningstar DividendInvestor newsletter discusses the qualifications for this list, including three newcomers for 2026, and highlights five of these stocks that Morningstar analysts consider undervalued. The piece also looks ahead to potential dividend growers for 2027, noting some candidates poised to maintain their status and one likely to slip.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) EVP logs small stock move and deferral share credits
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company's Executive Vice President, Sarah Shine, reported a routine compensation-related transaction and incentive share credits in a recent Form 4 filing. The filing details a J-coded "other" transaction of 8.943 Class A common stock shares at $218.93 each, adjusting her direct holdings to 547.285 shares. Additionally, 2,693.796 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits were reported, granting the right to receive equivalent Class A shares upon her departure from the company without set exercise or expiration dates.

feed.title: Alliant Energy stock reaches all-time high at 74.41 USD
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) stock has reached an all-time high of $74.48, marking a significant milestone with a 25% increase over the past year. Despite this surge, InvestingPro analysis indicates the stock is overvalued relative to its Fair Value. The company has a strong dividend history, having maintained payments for 56 consecutive years with a current yield of 2.91%.

feed.title: KeyCorp Increases Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) Price Target to $150.00
feed.summary: KeyCorp has raised its price target for Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) to $150 from $140, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a nearly 29% upside. This comes after Roku surpassed Q1 estimates with $0.57 EPS and $1.25 billion in revenue, leading management to increase its annual platform revenue outlook due to strong ad demand and subscriber growth. Despite positive momentum, the company faces high valuation and execution risks, as indicated by its high P/E ratio and recent insider share sales.

feed.title: Short Interest in PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE:PMT) Decreases By 16.2%
feed.summary: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE:PMT) experienced a 16.2% decrease in short interest, falling to 4,174,799 shares as of April 15th, representing 4.8% of the stock. The short-interest ratio is currently 3.2 days. Analysts have a consensus "Hold" rating on the stock with an average price target of $13.60, and the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, yielding 13.1%.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) EVP awarded additional phantom stock units
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) EVP Carlos G. Linares was granted 7.338 phantom stock units at a reference value of $97.06 per unit. This award increases his total holdings to 17,919.885 phantom stock units. These units track the value of common stock on a 1-for-1 basis but will be settled in cash under the company's Deferred Compensation Plan.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on L3Harris Technologies to $330 From $362, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for L3Harris Technologies (LHX) to $330, down from $362, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update comes as L3Harris lifted its 2026 profit forecast and reported a first-quarter beat for 2026, driven by strong weapons demand. The company also confidentially filed for an initial public offering of its missile unit.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Insiders Sell US$60m Of Stock, Possibly Signalling Caution
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) insiders have sold approximately US$60 million worth of stock over the past year, with no insider purchases recorded. The largest individual sale was US$22 million by Strategic Advisor Glen Hauenstein. While the company maintains high insider ownership at 0.6%, the significant selling activity, particularly US$47 million in the last three months, suggests potential caution among insiders despite the company being profitable and growing.

feed.title: Deere & Company Elects Brent Norwood as Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Deere & Company has appointed Brent Norwood as its new senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1, 2026. Norwood brings over 20 years of experience within Deere and the financial sector, having previously served as VP and finance director for the Construction and Forestry division. His appointment is strategic as Deere navigates evolving agricultural equipment demand, invests in automation, and manages broader macroeconomic pressures.

feed.title: Altria to Host Webcast of 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE: MO) will be hosting a live audio webcast of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will be virtual, allowing shareholders to vote and submit questions, with details for participation available on Altria's website. The company also encourages shareholders to review various business, financial, and corporate responsibility resources prior to the meeting.

feed.title: Provident Financial Services, Inc Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.24 (NYSE:PFS)
feed.summary: Provident Financial Services, Inc. has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share, resulting in an annualized dividend of $0.96 and a 4.3% yield. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 42.1% currently and a projected 37.6% based on next year's EPS estimates. The company recently reported Q1 EPS of $0.61, beating estimates, and revenue growth of 7.9% year-over-year.

feed.title: WW Grainger Shareholders Approve Directors, Auditor and Pay
feed.summary: At its April 29, 2026 annual meeting, W.W. Grainger (GWW) shareholders re-elected all management-nominated directors, including CEO D.G. Macpherson, ratified Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and approved the executive compensation plan. These decisions indicate strong shareholder confidence in the company's governance and leadership. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GWW as an "Outperform" due to its financial quality and technical momentum, even with higher valuation and some near-term pressures.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) CFO adjusts holdings through plan transactions
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity's CFO, Julie Marie Pelkowski, reported a small 401(k) plan transaction involving 7.761 shares of Class A common stock at $218.93 per share, categorized as a restructuring. Following this, her direct holdings include 670.705 Class A shares and 2,093.733 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan share credits. These share credits represent future Class A shares to be received upon her retirement or separation from the company.

feed.title: RBC Trims Price Target on Smurfit Westrock to $53 From $54, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has adjusted its price target for Smurfit Westrock (SW) shares, lowering it to $53 from the previous $54, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This update comes shortly after similar adjustments by Truist Securities following Smurfit Westrock's Q1 earnings results, amidst other news regarding the company's financial performance and operational agreements.
